_note: BIBLICAL FILL, from scripture itself. The continuous named line scripture preserves runs Adam -> Abraham (Genesis 5 & 11) -> Judah -> David -> the kings of Judah -> Zerubbabel -> Joseph -> Jesus (Ruth 4, 1 Chronicles 1-3, Matthew 1, Luke 3). The royal tree joins at ESAU: Herod the Great was an Idumean, and scripture identifies the Idumeans/Edomites as the sons of Esau (Genesis 36:1,9) -- Isaac's other son, Jacob's twin. So the tree forks at Isaac exactly as scripture does. The ONE unrecorded span (Eliphaz -> Antipater) is a single clearly-labeled bridge with an explicit biblical basis (Gen 36), NOT a set of invented names. The Hasmonean ascent stops at Simeon, which is exactly where 1 Maccabees 2:1 stops. Ussher chronology used for placement. Top-down order; HERODGREAT and MATTATHIAS pre-exist (defined in 03/06).
